meta.title: Can the B-21 carry air-to-air missiles??
meta.description:
After looking over images of the B-21 Raider's first test flight, we can't help but notice that the bomber appears to have not one weapons bay... but three. 

These secondary bays may simply be access panels for maintenance or repairs, but if they are designed to carry additional ordnance, what types of weapons might America's new stealth bomber want to carry with it into the fight? 

Let's run through some possibilities.
